Hand
Click a card to play it.

No cards in hand.

Ash Circuit

Defeat the Glass Warden with a deterministic starter deck. Each player turn starts with 3 energy and a five-card hand. The enemy intent panel shows its next move before you end your turn.

This phase adds draw, mixed attack-and-guard, Focus, and Fractured status. No rewards, deck upgrades, map, or run structure are included.

Start Combat
